description: The CAT OS content registry. Every content item ever created has exactly one entry here; no item exists outside it, and no entry exists without a file. Fields follow CONTENT_GENERATION_PIPELINE.md section 2, extended with the fields the schemas require (estimated_time_min; stage since v2; difficulty_numeric since 0.6.0 so the journey can order passages truthfully within a stage). Updated once per batch and committed with the batch's content files.

items.title: Words That Do No Work

items.title: Why the Quartet Costs More

items.reviewer_notes: Counter-intuitive economics with a mechanism the reader must hold across paragraphs; the main-idea trap inflates a relative claim into a claim about absolute decline. Owner review pending.

items.title: More Than the Sum
items.theme: emergence and the limits of reductive explanation
items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Premium Reading Library milestone); RC_MASTER_GENERATION_PROMPT.v1 + CAT_VARC_BIBLE craft rules applied
items.reviewer_notes: Elite-register science-ideas passage with an understated thesis that occupies a middle position; the central near-tie is between the author's qualified emergentism and a stronger anti-reductionism the author declines. Owner review pending.

items.title: The Comfort of the Familiar
items.theme: familiarity itself, apart from quality, makes us like things more
items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Premium Reading Library milestone); RC_MASTER_GENERATION_PROMPT.v1 + CAT_VARC_BIBLE craft rules applied
items.reviewer_notes: Foundation-stage psychology: one clean finding developed concretely. Distractors train the separation of 'familiarity' from 'quality' and from 'conscious recognition'. Owner review pending.

items.title: The Consent of the Defeated

items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Premium Reading Library milestone); RC_MASTER_GENERATION_PROMPT.v1 + CAT_VARC_BIBLE craft rules applied
items.reviewer_notes: Reframing passage: the visible act (voting) is demoted, the invisible one (losers' consent) promoted. Main-idea trap keeps the reader on the winners. Owner review pending.

items.title: The Outsourced Conscience

items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Premium Reading Library milestone); RC_MASTER_GENERATION_PROMPT.v1 + CAT_VARC_BIBLE craft rules applied
items.reviewer_notes: Hard technology-ethics with a subtle thesis (not that machines decide badly, but that our capacity to decide atrophies). Includes a strengthen/weaken item on the load-bearing assumption. Owner review pending.

items.title: The Strength of Weak Ties
items.theme: why loose acquaintances, not close friends, are the bridges that carry new information
items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Premium Reading Library milestone); RC_MASTER_GENERATION_PROMPT.v1 + CAT_VARC_BIBLE craft rules applied
items.reviewer_notes: Counter-intuitive sociology; the reader must grasp that the argument is about the structural POSITION of weak ties, not their emotional warmth. Owner review pending.

items.title: Setting the Nation's Clocks

items.reviewer_notes: Foundation-stage history-of-ideas: a familiar thing (clock time) shown to be a recent invention. Distractors train the difference between the cause given and plausible alternatives. Owner review pending.

items.title: The Trouble with the Pristine

items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Premium Reading Library milestone); RC_MASTER_GENERATION_PROMPT.v1 + CAT_VARC_BIBLE craft rules applied

items.title: The Original and Its Ghost

items.reviewer_notes: Arts-culture with a clean but non-obvious thesis (value as history, not appearance). Main-idea trap keeps the reader on visual fidelity. Owner review pending.

items.title: Who Owns a Poem's Meaning

items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Premium Reading Library milestone); RC_MASTER_GENERATION_PROMPT.v1 + CAT_VARC_BIBLE craft rules applied
items.reviewer_notes: Literature-theory with a two-sided thesis: intention doesn't govern meaning, but interpretation isn't unlimited. The central trap is the 'anything goes' overshoot. Owner review pending.

items.title: The Market That Ate Itself

items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Premium Reading Library milestone); RC_MASTER_GENERATION_PROMPT.v1 + CAT_VARC_BIBLE craft rules applied
items.reviewer_notes: Hard economics with a self-reinforcing mechanism (adverse selection) the reader must track step by step; includes a strengthen/weaken item on the load-bearing information assumption. Owner review pending.

items.title: Why the Past Keeps Changing

items.title: The Fortunes of the Guilty

items.title: Believing What We Have Done

items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Premium Reading Library milestone); RC_MASTER_GENERATION_PROMPT.v1 + CAT_VARC_BIBLE craft rules applied
items.reviewer_notes: The counter-intuitive direction (action shapes belief, not only belief action) is the crux; distractors reverse it or over-generalise. Owner review pending.

items.title: Who Are the People?

items.title: No Such Thing as a Free Gift

items.title: The Panic and the Threat

items.title: The Swan and the Test

items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Para Summary milestone); PARA SUMMARY BIBLE frameworks applied

items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Para Summary milestone); PARA SUMMARY BIBLE frameworks applied

items.title: The Price of a Parking Space
items.theme: how parking requirements reshaped urban cost and form
items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Para Summary milestone); PARA SUMMARY BIBLE frameworks applied
items.reviewer_notes: The first verbatim lure of the ladder: option B reuses the paragraph's phrases with the mechanisms crossed. The correct answer paraphrases. Owner review pending.

items.title: The Myth of the Debtless Mind

items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Para Summary milestone); PARA SUMMARY BIBLE frameworks applied
items.reviewer_notes: A marked turn, but the opening view is owned by it is often said, so the trap teaches owner tracking as well as turn finding. Owner review pending.

items.title: The Concrete That Heals

items.title: Hope, Not a Claim

items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Para Summary milestone); PARA SUMMARY BIBLE frameworks applied

items.title: The Second Pair of Eyes

items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Para Summary milestone); PARA SUMMARY BIBLE frameworks applied

items.title: Where Help Turns Into Hindrance

items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Para Summary milestone); PARA SUMMARY BIBLE frameworks applied
items.reviewer_notes: The signature Premium item: an unmarked turn against a plausible opening, a threshold claim with dense qualifiers, a near miss dropping the threshold, a layered concession lure (elite layering, both subtle), and a necessary-sufficient swap. Owner review pending.

items.title: The Room That Empties Your Hands
items.theme: the doorway effect and how the mind files experience by location
items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Odd One Out milestone); ODD_MAN_OUT_BIBLE frameworks applied
items.reviewer_notes: The journey's opening item: a clean expository core about one phenomenon, and an outlier from the same field that plainly begins a different discussion. Deliberately low overlap; a topic matcher succeeds here, and the tiers above take that comfort away. Owner review pending.

items.title: The Clocks That Tamed the Town
items.theme: how public clocks changed the rhythm of medieval town life
items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Odd One Out milestone); ODD_MAN_OUT_BIBLE frameworks applied
items.reviewer_notes: Foundation narrative: a chronological account of public clocks reshaping work. The outlier is warmer and more picturable than the core, an aside about church bells and weddings that no claim employs. Teaches that vivid and relevant sounding is not employed. Owner review pending.

items.title: The Ice That Remembers the Air
items.theme: how bubbles trapped in glacial ice record ancient atmospheres
items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Odd One Out milestone); ODD_MAN_OUT_BIBLE frameworks applied
items.reviewer_notes: Easy tier: a specific expository account of how ice cores preserve air. The outlier is a correct, textbook generalisation about how science works, dropped into the specific process. Teaches general versus specific. Outlier at A. Owner review pending.

items.title: The Harbour That Priced Itself
items.theme: how a single crowded fishing harbour rationed its berths by price
items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Odd One Out milestone); ODD_MAN_OUT_BIBLE frameworks applied
items.reviewer_notes: Easy tier, first modest overlap. The core is a single harbour case study; the outlier makes a sweeping claim about prices across a whole economy. Same topic, wrong scope. Outlier at B. Owner review pending.

items.title: The Verdict in the Applause
items.theme: how a critic reads standing ovations as a claim about audiences, not about plays
items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Odd One Out milestone); ODD_MAN_OUT_BIBLE frameworks applied
items.reviewer_notes: Medium, first Trap B. The core is a critic's argument that ovations measure audiences, not plays. The outlier reports, neutrally, that many theatregoers enjoy giving ovations, hooked on by a pronoun and the word ovation. Stance shift from argument to reportage. Outlier at C. Owner review pending.

items.title: The Blue That Cost a Kingdom
items.theme: how the scarcity of ultramarine shaped where painters dared to use it
items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Odd One Out milestone); ODD_MAN_OUT_BIBLE frameworks applied
items.reviewer_notes: Medium thread break. The core narrates how ultramarine's cost governed its use and meaning. The outlier switches to how the pigment was chemically made, sharing heavy vocabulary and a connective. Outlier at D. Owner review pending.

items.title: The Signal from the Silent Deep
items.theme: what a survey of the deep seafloor discovered about oxygen far from sunlight
items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Odd One Out milestone); ODD_MAN_OUT_BIBLE frameworks applied
items.reviewer_notes: Medium method versus finding, the Bible's §4 e/f prototype. The core narrates what was discovered about oxygen on the deep seafloor; the outlier reports how the survey was conducted, richly camouflaged. Outlier at E. Owner review pending.

items.title: The Promise That Binds Tomorrow
items.theme: why a promise creates an obligation that mere prediction does not
items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Odd One Out milestone); ODD_MAN_OUT_BIBLE frameworks applied
items.reviewer_notes: Advanced, first Trap A. The core argues why a promise binds where prediction does not; the outlier A is a broad general definition of obligation. Meanwhile the belonging sentence E is dressed with a bare and and a second person shift to draw the eye. Outlier at A. Owner review pending.

items.title: The Census That Made a Nation
items.theme: how the practice of counting a population helped bring the nation into being
items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Odd One Out milestone); ODD_MAN_OUT_BIBLE frameworks applied
items.reviewer_notes: Advanced wrong scope, inverted from ooo-0004: here the core is general and the intruder narrows to a single country. Both traps present. Outlier at B. Owner review pending.

items.title: The Gift That Demands a Return
items.theme: why a gift in many societies obliges the receiver rather than freeing them
items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Odd One Out milestone); ODD_MAN_OUT_BIBLE frameworks applied
items.reviewer_notes: Advanced stance shift. The core describes gift exchange analytically; the outlier moralises about modern consumerism, sharing heavy vocabulary. Outlier at C. Owner review pending.

items.title: The Map That Edits the City
items.theme: how navigation apps quietly reshape the streets they claim only to describe
items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Odd One Out milestone); ODD_MAN_OUT_BIBLE frameworks applied
items.reviewer_notes: CAT tier, local smoothness. The intruder D reads perfectly after C via a shared demonstrative, but its purpose, privacy, is a thread the paragraph never runs. Only the global purpose test convicts it. Outlier at D. Owner review pending.

items.title: The Forest That Talks Through the Soil
items.theme: what researchers found about trees sharing resources through underground fungal networks
items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Odd One Out milestone); ODD_MAN_OUT_BIBLE frameworks applied
items.reviewer_notes: CAT tier method versus finding at overlap 5. The intruder reports the isotope labelling procedure inside a paragraph about what the sharing means. Very high camouflage. Outlier at E. Owner review pending.

items.title: The Wage That Rises With the Robot
items.theme: why automation can raise the wages of the very workers it fails to replace
items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Odd One Out milestone); ODD_MAN_OUT_BIBLE frameworks applied
items.reviewer_notes: CAT tier topically alien under high overlap. The intruder shares the automation and wage vocabulary but opens a different question, retraining and displacement, that the complementarity argument never engages. Outlier at A. Owner review pending.

items.title: The Narrator Who Cannot Be Trusted
items.theme: how a story lets a reader see past the very narrator telling it
items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Odd One Out milestone); ODD_MAN_OUT_BIBLE frameworks applied
items.reviewer_notes: CAT+ both traps. Intruder B is a general definition of fiction; decoy D wears a present tense reader address. Only removing each and reading the remainder separates them. Outlier at B. Owner review pending.

items.title: The Expert Who Forgot How to Explain
items.theme: why growing expertise can make a skill harder, not easier, to teach
items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Odd One Out milestone); ODD_MAN_OUT_BIBLE frameworks applied
items.reviewer_notes: CAT+ both traps. The core explains why expertise dulls teaching; the intruder recommends what firms should do, an is to ought stance shift. A belonging sentence wears a blunt one word opener as decoy. Outlier at C. Owner review pending.

items.title: The Molecule That Would Not Leave
items.theme: what a study of persistent chemicals revealed about their reach into the body
items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Odd One Out milestone); ODD_MAN_OUT_BIBLE frameworks applied
items.reviewer_notes: Elite method versus finding, the PFAS style definitional intruder recast. The core narrates the reach of persistent chemicals; the intruder reports which tissues the team chose to sample, dressed as a result. Subtlety 5. Outlier at D. Owner review pending.

items.title: The Freedom to End It
items.theme: a philosophical argument that the freedom to die gives shape to the freedom to live
items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Odd One Out milestone); ODD_MAN_OUT_BIBLE frameworks applied
items.reviewer_notes: Elite thread break, the assisted-dying prototype (Bible §4a). The core builds a conceptual argument; the intruder discusses the historical, sociological causes of modern attitudes to death, a different dimension. Subtlety 5. Outlier at A. Owner review pending.

items.title: The Coffeehouse That Argued Back
items.theme: how the early coffeehouse turned reading from a private act into a public argument
items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Odd One Out milestone); ODD_MAN_OUT_BIBLE frameworks applied
items.reviewer_notes: Elite example without a claim. The core argues that the coffeehouse made reading public and argumentative; the intruder is a vivid aside about coffee as a costly sensory novelty, a claim the argument never makes. Subtlety 4, overlap 5. Outlier at E. Owner review pending.

items.title: The Silence That Consents
items.theme: why a theory of tacit consent struggles to bind those who never chose
items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Odd One Out milestone); ODD_MAN_OUT_BIBLE frameworks applied
items.reviewer_notes: Premium stance shift at maximal subtlety. The core is the author's own critique of tacit consent; the intruder reports, neutrally, how defenders answer the critique, an owner and stance shift. A belonging critical sentence wears a Latin tag as decoy. Outlier at D. Owner review pending.

items.title: The Model That Ate Its Own Signal
items.theme: why a forecast widely acted upon can undo the very regularity it relied on
items.prompt_version: in-repo authored (Odd One Out milestone); ODD_MAN_OUT_BIBLE frameworks applied
items.reviewer_notes: Premium general versus specific at maximal subtlety. The core builds one specific self defeating prophecy argument; the intruder is a broad maxim about all models being simplifications, dressed as the thesis. A belonging step wears an equation like clause as decoy. Outlier at B. Owner review pending.
